prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda WL-T 4.1L turbo-diesel (engine code: WL-T)** with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Tomei 272° camshaft** and **N1 oil pump** for increased lubrication under high boost (targeting 450Nm+ torque at 2,500 RPM).

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **HKS Hi-Power** with a **Scorpion 409-grade downpipe** and **MagnaFlow 1045 muffler** to optimize backpressure for the WL-T’s variable geometry turbo (VGT).

**Purpose-built 6-speed manual transmission upgrade** using a **Toyota H151F gearbox** (from a Land Cruiser 70 Series) with a **PPG close-ratio gear set (2.5:1 1st gear)** and **South Bend Stage 3 clutch** to handle the increased torque, paired with a **Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD)** for improved traction.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (specifically modified for the Titan’s cab-over chassis) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** and **polyurethane overfenders** to accommodate **20x10 ET0 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels** wrapped in **Toyo Open Country R/T Trail 285/50R20 tires**.

**Full custom front bumper** by **Seibon Carbon** with integrated **LED light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro)** and **carbon fiber tow hooks**, paired with a **custom rear diffuser** by **AIT Racing** to reduce drag and improve airflow under the flatbed.

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro SR-7 seats (JDM-spec)** mounted on **Corbeau bolt-in seat brackets**, a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**, and **custom aluminum gauge pods** housing **Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, EGT, oil pressure)** alongside a **Pioneer AVH-4200NEX head unit** with **Focal Utopia Be tweeters** for audio clarity.
